gloss.en: A conjecture we intend to test; no evidence yet.
gloss.zh: 我们打算测试的猜想；目前尚无证据。
有证据支持但尚未形式化证明。

gloss.en: Under active investigation; could go either way.
gloss.zh: 正在积极调查中；结果尚不确定。

gloss.en: We tested it and falsified it ourselves.
gloss.zh: 我们已测试并自行证伪。

gloss.en: We published it, then found a confounder and retracted the strong form.
gloss.zh: 我们发表后发现了混淆因素，并撤回了较强形式。

gloss.en: Backed by a machine-checked Lean proof.
gloss.zh: 由机器检查的 Lean 证明支持。
持续刷新的证据（实时实验室金丝雀）。

blurb.en: Orientation, shared vocabulary, data provenance, and the research agenda. Start here if you are new.
blurb.zh: 方向、共享词汇、数据来源与研究议程。如果你是新来的，从这里开始。

blurb.en: Every claim we have tested, its lifecycle status, and the evidence behind it. The hypothesis ledger.
blurb.zh: 我们测试过的每个声明、其生命周期状态及其背后的证据。假设台账。

blurb.en: How we measure, bound, and reason about potential error — from sloppy-model geometry to Bayesian active learning.
blurb.zh: 我们如何测量、界定和推理势函数误差 — 从 sloppy-model 几何到贝叶斯主动学习。

blurb.en: Benchmarks, live-lab results, and the MLIP flywheel evidence chain.
blurb.zh: 基准测试、实时实验室结果以及 MLIP 飞轮证据链。

blurb.en: Lean-backed theorem proofs, build-locking contracts, and the formal proof ledger.
blurb.zh: Lean 支持的定理证明、构建锁定契约以及形式化证明台账。

blurb.en: What changed, why, and what is next. The narrative spine of the project.
blurb.zh: 改变了什么、为什么以及下一步是什么。项目的叙事主线。

blurb.en: The literature we build on, the funding context, and the adversarial reviews our claims passed before going public.
blurb.zh: 我们所依据的文献、资金背景以及我们的声明在公开前通过的对抗性评议。

blurb.en: How this library was built and how to reproduce every result. Extraction logs, ADRs, and operational fabric.
blurb.zh: 该图书馆是如何构建的，以及如何复现每个结果。提取日志、架构决策记录和运营结构。

description.en: Evaluate the claims against the evidence.
Understand the flywheel, the operator, and how to reproduce results.
description.zh: 理解飞轮、算子以及如何复现结果。

description.en: Assess epistemic discipline and formal backing.
description.zh: 评估认识论纪律和形式化支持。

entries.title: Hyper-Ribbon Universality
entries.subtitle: Error vectors occupy a low-dimensional manifold (PR 1.05–1.86). Lean-grounded.

entries.title: Hyper-Ribbon Transfers Classical → MLIP
entries.subtitle: Cross-paradigm ribbon transfer — per-element counts under re-audit after Born screening (2026-06); directional structure confirmed at 8–11 models.

entries.title: Cross-MLIP Orthogonal Error Modes
entries.subtitle: MACE and CHGNet fail in orthogonal directions — the precondition for ensembling.

entries.title: Au Escapes the Ribbon Under MLIPs
entries.subtitle: Confirmed for MACE + CHGNet; Ag escape refuted. Mechanism open.

entries.title: Fe Magnetic MLIP Failure Mode
entries.subtitle: The old PR > 2 trio claim is frozen after Born screening; Fe remains a spin/mechanical-stability target.

entries.title: D-Band Controls Error Correlation
entries.subtitle: Refuted — full-sample ρ = −0.02; the signal was a sample-size confounder.

entries.title: MEAM Is Intrinsically 2-D
entries.subtitle: Refuted by matched-n bootstrap; a narrower bounded claim survives.

entries.title: The BCC/FCC "Causal Shield"
entries.subtitle: Self-corrected — the dramatic r 0.90 vs 0.04 was 1.5% data contamination.

entries.title: The Three Error-Geometry Objects
entries.subtitle: Model manifold vs. participation-ratio measure vs. configuration-space core — kept straight.

entries.title: Sloppy Models & Potential Transferability
entries.subtitle: Fisher Information eigenvalue analysis — stiff vs. sloppy directions.

entries.title: Renormalization Group Coarse-Graining
entries.subtitle: Systematically deriving effective potentials via partition-function matching.

entries.title: Information-Theoretic Bounds on Model Error
entries.subtitle: Kolmogorov complexity, rate-distortion, and Shannon entropy for model selection.

entries.title: Methodology — How We Know, and How We Catch Ourselves
entries.subtitle: Matched-n, contamination gating, ecological-fallacy stratification — the reusable discipline.

entries.title: Multi-Fidelity UQ & the glimMER Paradigm
entries.subtitle: Cross-potential meta-analysis and PCA-based error correction operators.

entries.title: Bayesian Active Learning for Potential Selection
entries.subtitle: Gaussian Process surrogates across 23 potentials × 12,000 materials.

entries.title: Ensemble Methods from Climate Science
entries.subtitle: Transferring weighting strategies from weather to atomistic simulation.

entries.title: GNNs for Predicting Potential Errors
entries.subtitle: Predicting where a potential will fail from crystal-structure topology.

entries.title: Topological Data Analysis of Error Landscapes
entries.subtitle: Persistent homology for high-dimensional error surfaces.

entries.title: Phonon Frequency Benchmarking
entries.subtitle: Second-derivative tests as the gold standard for potential validation.

entries.title: Phonon Benchmarking — Key Findings
entries.subtitle: Executive summary of the most consequential phonon findings for Lupine.

entries.title: MLIP Cloud Baseline and Distill: First Real 5x5 Results
entries.subtitle: Cloud Run completed the 25-cell MLIP baseline and produced the first backend-diverse Distill energy wins.

entries.title: Ni Paired Accuracy Live Report
entries.subtitle: Live baseline-versus-Distill Accuracy evidence for the Ni fcc EAM-home-turf campaign.

entries.title: Ni Zero-Point Policy Replay
entries.subtitle: Local Rust replay turns the Ni promotion canary green before a Cloud Run image rebuild.

entries.title: MPtrj Broad-DFT MLIP Canary
entries.subtitle: Support-floor v2 improves MACE, ORB, and SevenNet while CHGNet safely holds: six wins, two holds, zero regressions.

entries.title: Round 2 Preregistration — MatPES MLIP Elastic Constants
entries.subtitle: Pre-registered protocol: 16 cubic elements, four MatPES potentials, two functionals, and the operator-correction kill conditions.

entries.title: Round 2 Results — MatPES MLIP Elastic Constants across 16 Cubic Elements
entries.subtitle: 1×1×1 vs 3×3×3 supercell convergence, per-model MAE, and the Lupine correction operator on MatPES PBE and r2SCAN.

entries.title: Layer 2 Supercell Scaling Evaluation
entries.subtitle: Technical memo: elastic constants are converged at the 1×1×1 conventional cell; 3×3×3 adds runtime without accuracy gain.

entries.title: MatPES MLIP Elastic Constants: A 16-Element Benchmark
entries.subtitle: Draft research paper covering methods, results, and implications for machine-learning interatomic potentials.

entries.title: MLIP Elastic Benchmark Preprint
entries.subtitle: 1×1×1 conventional-cell accuracy matches 3×3×3 at ~4× lower cost; operator failure diagnosis.

entries.title: MLIP Elastic Benchmark Protocol
entries.subtitle: Reusable protocol for the MatPES cubic-metal 16-element elastic-constant benchmark.

entries.title: Operator Failure Diagnosis
entries.subtitle: Why the LOO-PCA bias operator degraded MAE and what scalar-bulk operator v0.2 learned instead.

entries.subtitle: Current status: 77 build-locked theorems, ~225 declarations, 2,891-job build green, and a build-locking epistemic contract.
